note: Shared fleet-attention classifier cases for docs/room-attention.md decision 4 (the CLOSED set of actionable agent states) and issue #69. Consumed by BOTH the TypeScript (ui/src/lib/fleet.test.ts) and Dart (dart/jeliya_protocol/test/conventions_test.dart) attention tests, so React and Flutter group and rank agents from one source. `liveness` is the derived FleetAgent.liveness ('working'|'online-idle'|'stale'|'offline'); `latest_label` is the newest agent_status label, or null when the agent has never posted one. `expect.reason` is the attentionReason / null; `expect.unverified` is whether the latest-status chip must be qualified (statusUnverified). The eight AC states map on: failed/errored/blocked -> reason 'failed'; awaiting-review/reviewing/pending -> 'review'; stale -> 'stale'; offline-after-work -> 'offline'.
